_comment: Curl if Flow — scanner config. Edit this file with your keys and settings.

_notes.discord_webhook_url: Create a webhook in Discord: Server Settings → Integrations → Webhooks → Copy URL
_notes.telegram: Create a bot via @BotFather, get token. For chat_id: message your bot, then visit https://api.telegram.org/bot<TOKEN>/getUpdates
_notes.data_source: yfinance has ~15min delay for free. For real-time, use Alpaca: https://alpaca.markets (free paper trading account)
_notes.float_data: Finviz has float data: pip install finviz. Free tier works for scanning.
